display_name: Миша Карпов — AI, продукты и рост ⛳

summary.short_rationale: Misha is useful but overlap-heavy. His strongest unique value is PM/founder-facing Builder PM and human-AI workflow framing, not general AI coding or agent architecture.
summary.strongest_argument_for: The passport exposes a real clean gap around ai_product_pm/pm_workflow/build_human_ai_workflow for product leaders becoming AI builders.
summary.strongest_argument_against: Three of four matrix cells overlap accepted dense areas, with Polyakov as the closest existing expert and one exact likely duplicate.

good_fit: non-technical product leader adoption of AI-assisted building

preferred_existing_experts.polyakov: custom skills, business automation, marketing/SEO automation
preferred_existing_experts.ilia_izmailov: Claude Code workflows and AI-assisted product validation
preferred_existing_experts.ai_architect_refat_neuraldeep: technical agentic development, architecture, evals, tool calling, and infrastructure

risk_notes: Commercial/course bias is present and should limit broad routing.
The Telegram export has no comments, so community signal is unavailable.
The candidate may sound more distinctive than he is because the accepted roster already covers nearby agentic workflow topics.
The agent-as-employee framing is useful but may become motivational without concrete implementation details.

probe_shape: 1 technical agentic workflow query where Misha should not dominate
acceptance_threshold: Adds selected sources for PM/founder workflow questions.
Does not dominate technical architecture questions.
Adds at least one distinct Builder PM or AI team management angle not already supplied by Polyakov or Ilia.
